'''tachaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pobbies|pobbies]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pobbies|pobbies]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tachaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæchæhæth|tæchæhæth]] || [[word:tæchæhæj|tæchæhæj]] || [[word:tæchæhæsh|tæchæhæsh]] || [[word:tæchæhæ|tæchæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tachachahath|tachachahath]] || [[word:tachachahaj|tachachahaj]] || [[word:tachachahash|tachachahash]] || [[word:tachachaha|tachachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tachahath|tachahath]] || [[word:tachahaj|tachahaj]] || [[word:tachahash|tachahash]] || [[word:tachaha|tachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tachafhath|tachafhath]] || [[word:tachafhaj|tachafhaj]] || [[word:tachafhash|tachafhash]] || [[word:tachafhaf|tachafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tachahatha|tachahatha]] || [[word:tachahaja|tachahaja]] || [[word:tachahasha|tachahasha]] || [[word:tachahaka|tachahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tachahath|tachahath]] || [[word:tachahaj|tachahaj]] || [[word:tachahash|tachahash]] || [[word:tachaha|tachaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tachahathal|tachahathal]] || [[word:tachahajal|tachahajal]] || [[word:tachahashal|tachahashal]] || [[word:tachahakal|tachahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tachahathatha|tachahathatha]] || [[word:tachahajaja|tachahajaja]] || [[word:tachahashasha|tachahashasha]] || [[word:tachahaka|tachahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tachahathan|tachahathan]] || [[word:tachahajan|tachahajan]] || [[word:tachahashan|tachahashan]] || [[word:tachahakan|tachahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tachahathaoro|tachahathaoro]] || [[word:tachahajaoro|tachahajaoro]] || [[word:tachahashaoro|tachahashaoro]] || [[word:tachahakaoro|tachahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
